<div id="main" class="col-md-9" role="main">

# stellfou

<div class="section level1">

Exploration of elliptical fourier analysis for cell shapes

![](reference/figures/sfou.jpg)

</div>

</div>

<div id="main" class="col-md-9" role="main">

# Package index

<div class="section level2">

## All functions

</div>

<div class="section level2">

-   `compute_efa()` : Compute EFA for all cell boundaries
-   `efa_goodness_of_fit()` : Compute per-cell EFA goodness-of-fit
    metrics
-   `efa_pca()` : PCA on EFA coefficients and optionally store in SFE
-   `extract_cell_boundaries()` : sfe\_efa\_bridge.R – code created in
    dialogue with claude.ai Opus 4.6 medium, June 3 2026
-   `nn_dists()` : Compute nearest-neighbor distances from each row of A
    to B
-   `plot_efa_reconstruction()` : Plot original vs reconstructed cell
    boundaries
-   `polygon_area()` : Signed area of a polygon (positive if CCW)
-   `polygon_perimeter()` : Perimeter of a polygon
-   `reconstruct_cell()` : Reconstruct a cell boundary from its EFA
    coefficients
-   `remap_efa_fields()` : Remap EFA field names to the convention
    efourier\_i expects
-   `resample_contour()` : Resample a contour to n equally-spaced points
    by arc length
-   `run_efa_pipeline()` : Run the full EFA pipeline on an SFE object
-   `store_efa_in_sfe()` : Add EFA coefficients as a reducedDim in the
    SFE object
-   `store_gof_in_sfe()` : Store GoF metrics in colData of an SFE object

</div>

</div>

<div id="main" class="col-md-9" role="main">

# Articles

<div class="section">

### All vignettes

<div class="section-desc">

</div>

-   [stellfou: exploration of elliptical fourier analysis for
    segmentations in spatial
    transcriptomics](https://github.com/vjcitn/stellfou/articles/stellfou.md):

</div>

</div>
